name: agentic-analyzer
description: Plugins that implement or support the agentic-analyzer pattern — LLM-judged, schema-validated, replayable code analyzers.

plugins.name: agentic-analyzer
plugins.description: Authoring kit: scaffolds new analyzer skills via an interactive `/new-analyzer` interview that drafts rules.md through a dispatched rule-author subagent. Ships four specialist subagents and a generic runtime (validator, snippet normalizer, fixture comparator, override-replay engine).
